<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Downloads violations CSV for report"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/rest/api/v1/governance/data/reports/{id}/download"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Downloads CSV violations report for a specific report id.

  as={"h2"}
